passing_score_scale: Scaled score; approximately 70% passing for most exams

testing_centers.notes: All NetApp exams are delivered exclusively through Pearson VUE. Online proctored (OnVUE) and test center options both available.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name on ID must match registration exactly.
exam_rules: No personal items, notes, or reference materials permitted. Online proctored via Pearson VUE OnVUE: must be alone in room, no second monitors. All candidates must accept the NetApp Certification Program Agreement before scheduling.
renewal_options: Certifications are valid for 2 years. Recertification requires passing the current version of the same exam or a higher-level exam in the same track before expiration. NetApp does not currently offer maintenance exams separate from the full exam.

retake_policy.notes: 14-day waiting period between failed attempts. Full exam fee applies for each retake attempt. Candidates who pass may not retake the exam to improve their score.

official_study_resources.title: NetApp Certification Exam Preparation
official_study_resources.notes: Exam objectives and preparation guides available on the official certification page.

official_study_resources.title: NetApp Learning Center
official_study_resources.notes: Official instructor-led and self-paced courses aligned to certification tracks.
